name: centella asiatica
title: centella asiatica benefits
description: Centella asiatica improves memory by enhancing cognitive function and ability to recall and learn new information. This benefit is crucial as it can help individuals with memory-related disorders such as Alzheimer's disease and dementia, while also improving academic and professional performance, for instance, by enhancing the ability to remember formulas, names, and tasks.
